name: FUEL & FURY
short_description: Smash, crush, and blast through relentless hordes in this adrenaline-fueled, apocalyptic, car driving, roguelike! In FUEL & FURY, you're behind the wheel in a frantic race against time and winter's icy grip to flee the country. Good luck survivor!
detailed_description:
What is it?

FUEL & FURY is an intense top-down shooter and driving game where you mow down hordes with your DEATH MACHINE of a CAR or your wild assortment of weaponry! From banana guns to bone crushers, you've got the tools to wreak havoc. Face off against zombies, bandits, and the military as you blaze a trail across the infected countryside!

The Story

YOU, the player, must escape the country before a brutal winter hits. But watch out! The military's got other plans. They're trying to contain the infection, and that means stopping people like YOU from getting away...

Gameplay

Start with a regular ol' car and turn it into your deadliest friend! Find upgrades to slap on turrets, spikes, power engines, and more. But your car isn't the only zombie slayer – YOU are too! Cook up crazy builds and synergies with a smorgasbord of weapons and items.

Of course, you'll need something to aim all this firepower at:

  • Plow through hordes of brain-hungry infected

  • Dodge and weave past special zombies with nasty tricks up their sleeves

  • Outsmart bandit gangs looking for an easy score

  • Go toe-to-toe with heavily armed soldiers as you get closer to freedom

Each area you explore is crawling with danger, and don't forget the deadly bosses waiting to really test your mettle!

The controls are simple – drive, dash, shoot, and survive – but mastering them is the key to staying alive in this undead nightmare. Every death is a lesson, and respawns are faster than a zombie's bite, keeping you in the action.

This is it. Take a deep breath. You've got this.

Will YOU be the one to survive the new undead age? If so, then PLAY NOW and get ready for the drive of your life!!!

supported_languages: English, German, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Korean, Russian
